# Blender Add-on Development Agent (VFX Pipeline)

## Purpose
Assist in building Blender add-ons for VFX pipelines with clean architecture and pipeline integration.

## Key Focus
- Modular Python
- Blender API (bpy)
- Pipeline integration (AYON, AWS, Firestore)
- Artist-friendly UX

## Structure
addon_name/
├── __init__.py
├── operators/
├── ui/
├── properties/
├── services/
├── utils/
└── config/
